title: Hire Local Expert
excerpt: Hi - I’m in Los Angeles and am looking to hire someone local that can support my business in using monday.com.  Does anyone here know anybody or what might be the best way to find someone?

posts.author: Angel_Connect (Angel Rodriguez)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi - I’m in Los Angeles and am looking to hire someone local that can support my business in using monday.com. Does anyone here know anybody or what might be the best way to find someone?

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Angel_Connect and welcome to the monday.com community forums!

Although I am not based in LA, the team at CarbonWeb is a Channel Partner with monday and based in Cleveland, OH. We work with companies not only all over the US, but also all over the world.

Depending on what you are trying to achieve with your environment I can either suggest some ways out team can help or point you in the direction of someone who can!

Feel free to grab some time with me here and we can discuss.

Good luck as you get started!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: greg_elevate (Gregory Thomson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Angel_Connect! Posting here is a good way to find a Monday.com expert, but it might be tough to find someone local on the forums.

If you need someone that can provide support in person, I’d suggest making a posting on highly-frequented social media/job platforms (Indeed, LinkedIn, Facebook) specifically asking for a Monday.com expert that can work in Los Angeles.

Feel free to reach out if you decide to go the tele-consultant route.
Email: greg@elevateops.io

posts.author: Angel_Connect (Angel Rodriguez)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks so much! I’ll keep you in mind.
